mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_schedule (schedule_content, schedule_price, schedule_state, schedule_reservation_date) VALUES(#{scheduleContent}, #{schedulePrice}, #{scheduleState}, #{scheduleReservationDate})
mapper.select:
SELECT schedule_num, schedule_content, schedule_price, schedule_state, schedule_register_date, schedule_update_date, schedule_reservation_date FROM tbl_schedule WHERE
schedule_reservation_date >= #{startDate} and schedule_reservation_date < date_add(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
